candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue figure; matches definition of total revenue/sales.

candidates.row_label: Ground leases/Rental Expenses in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Clearly an expense within cost of revenues, not total revenue.
Generic label; appears to be small non-operating income, not total revenue.
Finance income, not operating revenue.
Net finance result, not sales/revenue.
Tax on OCI, unrelated to revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Could be part of COGS formula but appears unused (all nan); less reliable than direct material purchases.
Canonical direct cost of goods for a retailer; best available proxy for COGS.
Likely includes SG&A payroll as well; not purely COGS.
Overhead/SG&A, not direct production/service cost.

candidates.row_label: Ground leases/Rental Expenses in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: A direct cost component but narrower than total COGS; better treated as part of COGS if doing full decomposition, but we prefer the broader ‘Materials Purchased’.
Selling expense (SG&A), not COGS.
Mixed/other operating line, not specific COGS.
Net operating result, includes revenues; not a COGS component.
Financial, not operating cost of sales.
Financing cost, not COGS.
Non-recurring item, not structural COGS.
Balance sheet liability, not period COGS.

variables.notes: Using ‘Materials Purchased’ as the main COGS proxy; it captures direct inventory purchase costs, which dominate COGS for a retailer.

candidates.why: Classified as revenue/other income, not SG&A expense.
Classic SG&A / overhead operating costs; best available SG&A component line.
Mixed income/expense line; less clean as pure SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not period SG&A expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: Intangible amortization; normally excluded from SG&A per instructions.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Selected the main ‘Other operating expenses’ line as the SG&A bucket and excluded totals/balance-sheet and amortization items per instructions.
No explicit research & development expense line is present; treating R&D as zero for PROF purposes.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary recurring interest expense line; best first-choice for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; relevant if main interest line is missing in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; useful fallback if other interest lines are missing.
Interest income, opposite sign of XINT; should not be used as primary interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list so later code can use the first available expense measure per year; excluded interest income from XINT.

candidates.why: Refers to profit allocation, not the balance sheet equity amount.
Component of equity, not total; excludes share capital and reserves.
Represents total shareholders’ equity; no separate parent/owner equity line exists, so this is the appropriate BE proxy.
Duplicate of ‘Total equity’ with different casing; same amount.
Technical balancing row, not the actual equity figure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row for the accounting identity, not equity itself.
Total assets/liabilities+equity, not equity alone.

variables.notes: No separate ‘equity attributable to owners/parent’ line exists, so total equity is used as BE; MIB is set to zero to avoid double counting.
No line item for non-controlling interests/minority interest appears on the balance sheet; treating MIB as zero.
